allow: PowerShell(npm install react-router-dom appwrite framer-motion recharts canvas-confetti lucide-react @google/genai)

PowerShell(node -e "const {Databases, Account} = require\('appwrite'\); console.log\('listDocuments' in Databases.prototype, Databases.prototype.listDocuments.length\); console.log\('createDocument', Databases.prototype.createDocument.length\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Account.prototype\).filter\(n=>/session|create|get/i.test\(n\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

PowerShell(@\("/src/routes/AppRoutes.jsx","/src/contexts/AppDataContext.jsx","/src/gemini/aiService.js","/src/appwrite/client.js","/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx","/src/pages/Statistics.jsx"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $x = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173$_" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "$\($x.StatusCode\)  $_" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL  $_  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(node -e "const {Databases}=require\('node-appwrite'\); console.log\('v', require\('node-appwrite/package.json'\).version\); const p=Databases.prototype; ['create','createCollection','createStringAttribute','createIntegerAttribute','createIndex'].forEach\(m=>console.log\(m, p[m].length, p[m].toString\(\).split\('\\n'\)[0]\)\)")

PowerShell(npm run schema > $null 2>&1; Write-Output "schema exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; npm run schema -- --md 2>&1 | Select-Object -Skip 3 -First 12; npx eslint . 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; if \($?\) { Write-Output "LINT CLEAN" }; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 1)

PowerShell($c = Get-Content README.md -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $bad = [regex]::Matches\($c, 'Â.|â€.'\); Write-Output "mojibake matches: $\($bad.Count\)"; \($bad | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Group-Object | Select-Object -First 8 Name, Count | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String\))

PowerShell($text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("README.md", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(1252\).GetBytes\($text\); $fixed = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $fixed = $fixed -replace "\(?m\)^\(### Indexes\)", "`r`n`$1"; $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("README.md", $fixed, $utf8NoBom\); $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("README.md", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); Write-Output "remaining mojibake: $\([regex]::Matches\($c,'Â.|â€.'\).Count\)")
